Feature 27: Two-Way Ratings
Description:
Pooja ke baad customer Pandit ko rate karta hai, aur Pandit bhi customer ko rate kar sakte hain.

Customer Rating Prompt (after puja):
"Customer [name] ko kitne star dena chahenge? 5 mein se koi number boliye."

Rating Options: 1 to 5 stars (voice: "Paach star")

Popular Comments Display (New Feature):
Jab Pandit comment dena chahte hain, to app pehle se popular comments dikhayegi:
"Yahan kuch lokpriya tippaniyaan hain jo anya Panditon ne isi tarah ke customers ke liye di hain. Sabse zyada pasand ki gayi tippani pehle dikh rahi hai:"

⭐ "Bahut hi sammanit parivar, samay ki paabandi acchi" (245 Panditon ne sahmati jatai)
⭐ "Pooja ki taiyari badhiya, sabhi samagri samay par uplabdh" (189 Panditon ne sahmati jatai)
⭐ "Muhurat ka dhyan rakha, baatcheet mein vinamr" (156 Panditon ne sahmati jatai)

"Kya aap inmein se kisi tippani se sehmat hain? Agar haan, to us tippani ka number boliye. Aapki sahmati jud jayegi."

Agar Pandit koi number bolta hai (e.g., "Pehla") → "Aapne pehli tippani se sahmati jatai. Dhanyavaad!"

Agar Pandit "Nahi" bolta hai → "Koi baat nahi."

Optional comment: "Koi tippani dena chahenge?"

"Theek hai, aap apni tippani bol sakte hain."

Customer Rating Display:
Pandit ke profile par customer ratings dikhti hain:
"⭐ 4.9 (234 reviews)"

Pandit Rating of Customer:

Public nahi dikhti

Pandit ko dikhti hai taaki pandit choose kar sake ki customer kaisa hai

Internal use: Platform ko identify karne mein madad milti hai ki kaunse customers issue create karte hain

Key Benefit: Mutual respect build hota hai. Quality control dono taraf se possible hai. Popular comments se relevant feedback quickly milega aur community ka consensus bhi dikhega.

🔍 Features 26-27: Instant Payment, Earnings Dashboard & Two-Way Ratings Edge Cases

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
F26-1	Pandit's bank account is frozen (due to ITD notice or fraud hold) — payment fails silently	Pandit doesn't receive payment; blames platform	Payment failure triggers immediate SMS + app notification; ops team contacts Pandit within 2 hours; funds held in escrow until account issue resolved	HIGH
F26-2	Pandit's earnings cross ₹50,000 in a year — TDS (10% u/s 194C) must be deducted; platform not configured	IT Department notice to platform; legal penalty	TDS deduction logic mandatory for payments exceeding ₹30,000 per booking or ₹1,00,000 cumulative per year; generate Form 16A annually	CRITICAL
F27-1	Customer gives 1-star rating out of spite after Pandit correctly refused an off-platform direct-payment request	Pandit's profile damaged unfairly; drops in search ranking	Rating submitted within 1 hour of any dispute/complaint is flagged for ops review; Pandit can contest within 24h; credible context-based rating removal	HIGH
F27-2	Coordinated fake ratings — competitor service encourages fake customers to register and bomb-rate top Pandits	Top Pandits damaged; search ranking manipulated	New account ratings require minimum 2 verified bookings on the account before ratings are counted; velocity check: >3 ratings from same IP/device = auto-flag	HIGH
F26-3	Pandit earns ₹20 lakh in a year — crosses GST registration threshold (₹20L for services)	Platform non-compliant; Pandit unaware of GST obligation	When Pandit crosses ₹15L cumulative earnings, show in-app notice: "You may need GST registration. Consult a CA." Platform should not auto-collect GST without Pandit's GSTIN	CRITICAL
F27-3	Pandit rates a customer poorly, customer finds out (data leak/bug), and harassment occurs	Safety risk to Pandit; legal risk to platform	Pandit's customer ratings must be architecturally isolated — separate encrypted table, no API endpoint accessible to customers, no admin leak possible; audit quarterly	CRITICAL
F26-4	Razorpay/Cashfree payout API goes down — "instant payment" not instant	Pandit expects money immediately; non-delivery of promise	Display payment SLA as "within 4 business hours" not "instant"; for UPI, T+1 settlement is guaranteed; clearly communicate	MEDIUM
Part 6: Profile & Growth (Pandit ka Vikas)

Update availability/blackout dates

Update travel preferences

Update personal/professional details

Key Benefit: Flexibility. Pandit ki badalti hui expertise platform par reflect ho sakti hai.

Feature 30: Festival Season & Premium Pricing
Description:
Pandit festival seasons ke liye premium pricing set kar sakte hain - extra percentage charge karenge.

Setup:
"Tyohaari season ke liye premium pricing set kar sakte hain."

For Each Festival:
"[Festival] (taarikh [dates]) ke liye kitna atirikt shulk lena chahenge? Prateeshat mein bataiye."

Examples:

Diwali (1-5 November) → 25%

Vivah season (Nov-Dec) → 15%

Navratri → 20%

How It Works:

Jab customer in dates ke liye book karega

Base price + premium percentage automatically apply hoga

Customer ko dikhega: "Tyohaari premium: +X%"

Festival premiums are opt-in only — never auto-applied by platform.

Key Benefit: Peak demand mein Pandit ko fair compensation milta hai. Dynamic pricing se income maximize ho sakti hai.

Feature 31: Blackout Dates (Unavailability)
Description:
Pandit specific dates mark kar sakte hain jab wo available nahi honge. Platform automatically un dates par booking block kar dega.

Add Blackout Date:
"Kya koi aisi taarikhain hain jab aap uplabdh nahi honge? Taarikh boliye."

Process:

Pandit date bolta hai (e.g., "15 August")

System confirms: "15 August blackout ke roop mein save ho gaya. Aur?"

Multiple dates add ki ja sakti hain

Remove Blackout Date:
"Aapne ye taarikhain blackout ki hain: [list]. Kya koi taarikh hatani hai?"

Pandit date bolta hai

System removes it

How It Works:

Jab customer booking try karega in dates par

System automatically show karega: "Pandit in tithiyon par uplabdh nahi hain"

Alternative dates suggest karega

Key Benefit: Double booking ka risk zero. Pandit ka personal time protected hai.

🔍 Features 29-31: Profile Editing, Festival Pricing & Blackout Dates Edge Cases

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
F29-1	Pandit increases dakshina by 200% after becoming popular — confirmed bookings at old price disputed	Either customer pays more or Pandit cancels; trust damage	Price edits only apply to NEW bookings; all confirmed bookings are price-locked at time of booking; contractually binding	CRITICAL
F29-2	Pandit removes a pooja from their profile after customers have already booked it (months in advance)	Future confirmed bookings for that pooja now have no provider	Cannot remove a pooja if active confirmed bookings exist for it; must first resolve/transfer all active bookings for that pooja type	HIGH
F31-1	Pandit adds a blackout for 15 days but accidentally blacks out an entire month (voice input error)	No bookings for a month; significant revenue loss	Show calendar preview before confirming blackout; require explicit "haan, sahi hai" for blackouts longer than 7 consecutive days	MEDIUM
F30-1	Platform adds festival premium (Diwali 25%) but Pandit did not set one — system auto-adds it	Customer sees higher price Pandit didn't intend; Pandit confused	Festival premiums are OPT-IN ONLY, never auto-applied; platform may suggest but Pandit must actively enable	HIGH
F30-2	Festival premium set for Diwali 1-5 Nov, but booking spans 29 Oct to 2 Nov — partial festival period	Price ambiguity; dispute	Booking price locked at time of booking initiation; if booking spans festival threshold, customer is shown the higher inclusive price at checkout	MEDIUM
Part 7: Pandit Consultancy (Pandit Se Baat) - Naya Aayam
Feature 32: Consultancy Setup & Configuration
Description:
Ye ek simple feature hai jisme customer Pandit se phone, video call, ya chat par baat kar sakta hai. Jaise kisi pooja ke baare mein jaankari chahiye, muhurat puchna hai, ya koi samasya hai to seedha Pandit se baat kar sakte hain. Isme per minute charge hoga jo Pandit khud set karega. Pandit ki availability customer ko dikhegi - online ya offline.

Enable Consultancy:
"Ab ek aur naya feature - Pandit se Baat (Consultancy). Ismein customer aapse phone, video call ya chat par baat kar sakte hain. Kisi bhi dharmik sawaal, muhurat ya pooja ki jankari ke liye. Iske liye aap prati minute shulk le sakte hain. Kya aap yah seva dena chahenge?"

Communication Preferences:
"Aap kin madhyamon se baat karna chahenge?"

Voice Call: "Phone call par baat karenge? 'Haan' ya 'Nahi'"

Video Call: "Video call par baat karenge? 'Haan' ya 'Nahi'"

Chat: "Chat (text) par baat karenge? 'Haan' ya 'Nahi'"

Per-Minute Charge Setup:
"Kisi bhi madhyam se baat karne ke liye aap kitna shulk rakhna chahenge? Rupaye mein bataiye."

Pandit: "20 rupaye prati minute"

Validation: "20 rupaye prati minute - sahi hai?"

Minimum Call Duration:
"Baatcheet ki nyuntam avadhi kya rakhni hai? Minute mein bataiye."

Default: 5 minute

Pandit change kar sakte hain (e.g., 3 minute, 10 minute)

Availability Setup - Online/Offline with Smart Auto-Toggle:
"Aapki uplabdhata ka tarika set karte hain."

Automatic Toggle Rules:
"Jab bhi aap app kholenge, main poochungi - 'Kya aap online hona chahte hain taaki customer aapse baat kar sakein?' Aap 'Haan' ya 'Nahi' bol sakte hain."

"Aapka status offline ho jayega agar:

Aap 'Nahi' bolenge

Aapka internet band ho jayega

Aap app ko 10 minute se zyada band rakhenge"

How it works:

Jab Pandit app kholta hai:

"Namaste Pandit ji. Kya aap aaj online hona chahte hain taaki customer aapse baat kar sakein? 'Haan' bolein ya 'Nahi'."

"Haan" → Status 🟢 online ho jata hai

"Nahi" → Status 🔴 offline rahta hai

Jab internet chala jaye:

App detect karega network loss

Turant status 🔴 offline ho jayega

Internet wapas aane par automatic prompt nahi, next app open karne par puchega

Jab app background mein chali jaye / band ho jaye:

10 minutes tak: Agar Pandit 10 minute ke andar app wapas khole, to status waisa ka waisa rahega (jaise tha)

10 minutes ke baad: Agar 10 minute se zyada ho gaye, to status automatically 🔴 offline ho jayega, fir se puchega "Online hona chahenge?"

Example Scenarios:

Pandit ne "Haan" kaha → 🟢 Online

5 minute baad app band kiya, 2 minute baad wapas khola → Still 🟢 Online (10 minute nahi hue)

15 minute baad wapas khola → 🔴 Offline (auto-offline), fir se puchega "Online hona chahenge?"

Key Benefit:

Pandit ko har baar toggle nahi karna padta

Chhoti chhoti interruptions (2-5 minute) mein status reset nahi hota

10 minute se zyada gap ho to auto-offline - customer unnecessarily call nahi karega jab Pandit app use hi nahi kar raha

Internet jaate hi offline - koi call miss nahi

Feature 34: Communication Request Flow with Wallet Check
Description:
Customer teen tarikon se Pandit se baat shuru kar sakta hai - voice call, video call, ya chat. Jab Pandit online hoga tabhi customer ye options dekhega. Customer ke wallet se per minute charge cut hoga.

A. Instant Voice/Video Call Flow

Customer Action: Customer "Voice Call" ya "Video Call" button dabata hai

System Check - Customer Wallet:

App check karega ki customer ke wallet mein minimum balance hai ya nahi (1 minute ka charge + buffer)

Agar balance kam hai → customer ko wallet recharge karne ka option

Notification to Pandit:
"🔔 Nayi Call - [Call Type]"

Screen:
📞 Nayi Call aa rahi hai

Customer: Ajay Kumar, Mumbai
Call prakar: Video Call
Shulk: ₹20/min (nyuntam 5 min)

[✅ Receive karein] [❌ Asweekar karein]

Voice:
"Nayi [Voice/Video] call. Customer Ajay Kumar, Mumbai se. Shulk 20 rupaye prati minute. Call receive karein?"

During Call:

App time track karti hai

Customer ke wallet se real-time deduction nahi, call end par total calculate hoga

Call end karne ka option dono taraf

Call End:
"Call samapt hui. Kul samay: 8 minute. Kul shulk: ₹160 (8 minute × ₹20)."

B. Chat Flow

Customer Action: Customer "Chat" button dabata hai

System Check - Customer Wallet: Minimum balance check (call ki tarah)

Notification to Pandit: "💬 Nayi Chat - Ajay Kumar, Mumbai"

Chat Screen: Simple chat interface. Pandit voice se type kar sakte hain (voice-to-text) ya directly type kar sakte hain.

Chat Billing Logic:

Timer tab start hota hai jab Pandit first reply karta hai

Timer tab stop hota hai jab:

Dono mein se koi chat band kare

Ya 5 minute inactivity ho (automatic pause)

Total time calculate hokar customer ke wallet se cut hoga

Chat End:
"Chat samapt hui. Kul samay: 12 minute. Kul shulk: ₹240 (12 minute × ₹20)."

Popular Comments Display (New Feature):
Jab Pandit comment dena chahte hain, to app pehle se popular comments dikhayegi:
"Yahan kuch lokpriya tippaniyaan hain jo anya Panditon ne isi tarah ke customers ke liye di hain. Sabse zyada pasand ki gayi tippani pehle dikh rahi hai:"

⭐ "Bahut hi sammanit parivar, samay ki paabandi acchi" (245 Panditon ne sahmati jatai)
⭐ "Pooja ki taiyari badhiya, sabhi samagri samay par uplabdh" (189 Panditon ne sahmati jatai)
⭐ "Muhurat ka dhyan rakha, baatcheet mein vinamr" (156 Panditon ne sahmati jatai)

"Kya aap inmein se kisi tippani se sehmat hain? Agar haan, to us tippani ka number boliye. Aapki sahmati jud jayegi."

Agar Pandit koi number bolta hai (e.g., "Pehla") → "Aapne pehli tippani se sahmati jatai. Dhanyavaad!"

Agar Pandit "Nahi" bolta hai → "Koi baat nahi."

Optional comment: "Koi tippani dena chahenge?"

"Theek hai, aap apni tippani bol sakte hain."

Customer Rating Display:
Pandit ke profile par customer ratings dikhti hain:
"⭐ 4.9 (234 reviews)"

Pandit Rating Display:
Profile par alag se dikhega:
"Pandit se Baat Rating: ⭐ 4.8 (156 reviews)"

Key Benefit: Quality control. Acchi ratings se aur customers aayenge. Pandit bhi customer ko rate kar sakte hain agar koi problem ho.

🔍 Features 32-35: Pandit Consultancy — Setup, Calls, Chat & Payments Edge Cases

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
F32-1	Customer calls with a genuine medical emergency disguised as religious query ("mere pita ko cancer hai, kya pooja karni chahiye?")	Platform liable for medical advice via Pandit; Consumer Protection Act risk	Mandatory disclaimer at start of every consultancy call: "Yeh platform dharmik salah deta hai, medical ya legal salah nahi." Train Pandits to redirect medical queries to doctors	CRITICAL
F34-1	Customer stays silent on a paid call — watching TV with call open to waste Pandit's time	Pandit's time wasted; customer pays but Pandit emotionally drained	If no audio detected from customer for 3 consecutive minutes, app auto-prompts both parties; if no response in 5 minutes, call auto-ends and billing stops	HIGH
F34-2	Connection drops after 30 seconds — customer wallet charged minimum 5 minutes, dispute filed	Revenue refund dispute; operational burden	Minimum billing only applies if connected time > 2 minutes; if < 2 min, auto-refund to customer wallet; transparent policy in T&C	HIGH
F34-3	Child uses parent's account to call a Pandit — runs up a large bill	Parent disputes charges; parental consent issue	Allow parents to set a "consultancy daily spending limit"; for accounts without mobile-verified adult Aadhaar, cap per-session at ₹100	HIGH
F34-4	Customer records the consultancy call without consent and posts it publicly	Pandit's religious advice taken out of context; reputation damage	Platform T&C prohibit recording; play a consent tone at call start; Pandit's screen shows recording indicator; legal notice template ready for violations	HIGH
F32-2	Pandit gives incorrect muhurat that causes customer to start a business on an inauspicious day — customer threatens to sue	Legal liability for religious advice	Standard disclaimer must be visible: "Panchang-based advice is subject to interpretation. Platform is not liable for outcomes." Pandit must state this verbally at start	HIGH
F32-3	Pandit is online status shows 🟢 but they are actually in a pooja and phone is with an assistant who picks up the call	Wrong person conducting consultancy; customer deceived	"Auto-offline" 10-minute rule helps, but not foolproof; when booking for pooja accepted, consultancy status auto-set to 🔴 for the duration of the booking +1 hour	HIGH
F35-1	Pandit's wallet accumulates earnings but payment gateway auto-holds it for 7 days — Pandit thinks money is missing	Distrust of platform's financial integrity	Clear "processing" vs "settled" balances in dashboard; "Your ₹X is in processing. Expected settlement: [date]."	MEDIUM
Part 8: Security, Finance & Emergency (Suraksha aur Samadhan)
Introduction:
"Pandit ji, ab hum baat karenge suraksha, vitt aur aapatkaaleen sthition ki. Ye wo suvidhaayein hain jo aapko mansik shanti denge. Aapki mehnat ka paisa surakshit rahega, kisi bhi vivad ka samadhan hoga, aur aapatkaal mein aap akele nahi honge."

Feature 36: Bank/UPI Verification & Penny Drop Test (KYC Part 2)
Description:
Aadhaar verification ke baad, bhugtan prapt karne ke liye bank ya UPI details lena anivaarya hai. Yah prakriya voice ke zariye hogi aur system turant ₹1 bhejkar (Penny Drop Test) naam confirm karega taaki fraud na ho.

Step 1 - Account Type Selection:
"Pandit ji, aapki dakshina seedhe aapke khate mein aayegi. Kripya bataiye – 'UPI' se paise lenge ya 'Bank khata' se?"

Step 2 - Details Collection:

If UPI: "Kripya apna UPI number boliye. Jaise – 9876543210@okhdfcbank"

Pandit UPI ID bolta hai

System repeat: "Aapne UPI ID [UPI ID] bola – sahi hai? 'Haan' ya 'Nahi'."

If Bank Account: "Kripya apna bank account number boliye."

Pandit account number bolta hai

"Ab apna IFSC code boliye."

Pandit IFSC bolta hai

"IFSC code [IFSC] aur account number [number] – sahi hai?"

Error Handling:

Agar UPI ID format galat → "UPI ID sahi nahi lag raha. Kripya phir se boliye. Udaharan ke liye – 9876543210@okhdfcbank"

Agar IFSC nahi mila → "IFSC code sahi nahi hai. Kripya dobara boliye."

3 baar galti par → "Operations team aapse sampark karegi."

Step 3 - Penny Drop Test:
"Hum aapke khate ki jaanch ke liye usmein ek rupaya bhej rahe hain... Kripya line par rahein."
(System ₹1 transfer karta hai aur bank se response ka intezaar karta hai)

Step 4 - Name Matching & Confirmation:
System bank se prapt naam ka milaan Aadhaar card ke naam se karega.
"Aapke bank khate mein naam 'Ramesh Sharma' aa raha hai. Yah sahi hai? 'Haan' bolein."

"Haan": "Aapka khata verify ho gaya hai. Ab sara bhugtan seedhe isi khate mein aayega."

"Nahi" ya naam match na hona: "Naam mel nahi kha raha hai. Kripya apni passbook ya cancel cheque ki photo khinchhein. Hamari team manually verify karegi."

Camera opens, Pandit photo click karta hai

"Photo mil gayi. Team 24 ghante mein verify kar degi."

Key Benefit: 100% surakshit payment. Koi typing mistake nahi hogi aur paisa galat khate mein nahi jayega.

🔍 Feature 36: Bank/UPI Verification & Penny Drop Test Edge Cases

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
1	Penny drop succeeds but bank account belongs to Pandit's wife — name mismatch with Aadhaar	Legal ambiguity; TDS reporting mismatch	Allow family member account with supporting document (marriage certificate or affidavit); mark as "linked third-party account" in records	HIGH
2	Pandit has only a Jan Dhan account (zero-balance) — some payment gateway APIs don't support these	Payment gateway fails silently; Pandit never paid	Explicitly test Jan Dhan account support with chosen gateway (Razorpay does support); fallback to IMPS if NEFT fails	HIGH
3	Pandit's bank account is in a cooperative or small rural bank with no IMPS/NEFT capability	No payment possible; Pandit can't access earnings	Offer UPI (mobile number linked) as primary method for rural Pandits; most cooperative bank customers have UPI via BHIM; test all major cooperative banks	HIGH
4	Pandit gives a regional language bank (e.g., Nagpur Nagrik Sahakari Bank) whose IFSC is not in the gateway's database	IFSC lookup fails; Pandit blocked	Maintain a comprehensive IFSC master database (RBI's official NEFT participant list); update quarterly; allow manual ops entry for unlisted banks	MEDIUM

Automated Trigger:
Jab koi booking confirm hoti hai aur samagri package ka mulya ₹1500 se adhik hota hai:

Pooja se 48 ghante pehle app automatic tarike se Pandit ke khate mein samagri mulya ka 50% transfer kar deta hai.

Voice Notification (48 hours before puja):
"🔔 Suchna: Aagami '[Pooja]' booking #[ID] ke liye samagri khareedne hetu ₹[amount] ka advance aapke khate mein bhej diya gaya hai. Baaki bhugtan pooja ke baad hoga."

If Advance Fails (Bank issue):
"Samagri advance bhejne mein samasya aa rahi hai. Kripya apne bank details check karein ya operations team se sampark karein."

Screen:
💸 Samagri Advance

Booking #B7821 - Vivah Sanskar
Chuna gaya package: Premium (₹8,000)

✅ ₹4,000 (50%) aapke khate mein bhej diya gaya
Sheṣ ₹4,000 pooja ke baad milenge

Bank khata: HDFC ****1234
Transaction ID: TXN123456789

Key Benefit: Pandit ka cashflow bana rahta hai. Unhe badi bookings lene mein aarthik sankoch nahi hota.

Feature 39: In-App Panchang & Muhurat Validation
Description:
Customer jab booking karte hain, to aksar anjaane mein galat samay (jaise raat ke 2 baje saamaanya pooja) chun lete hain. Yah feature in-built Panchang API ka istemal karke ajeeb samay ki pehchan karta hai aur Pandit ko alert karta hai.

Validation Flow (When booking request arrives):
System check karta hai ki kya chuna gaya samay Panchang ke hisaab se uchit hai.

Notification to Pandit:
"🔔 Nayi Booking - [Pooja]"

Alert:
⚠️ Muhurat Chetaavani

Pandit ji, ek nayi booking aayi hai.
Pooja: Griha Pravesh
Customer ne samay chuna: 15 May, dopahar 2:00

Panchang ke anusar: dopahar 2:00 par Rahukaal hai.
(Rahukaal: dopahar 12:00 - 1:30)

Kya karna chahenge?

[✅ Isi samay sweekar karein]
[🔄 Samay badalne ka sujhaav dein]
[❌ Booking asweekar karein]

Voice:
"Pandit ji, ek nayi booking aayi hai. Lekin dhyaan dein, customer ne 'Griha Pravesh' ke liye dopahar 2 baje ka samay chuna hai, jabki us samay Rahukaal hai. Kya aap ise isi samay sweekar karna chahte hain, ya customer ko samay badalne ka sujhaav dena chahte hain?"

Options:

"Sweekar karein" → Booking confirm ho jati hai (agar Pandit ko manzoor ho)
"Booking sweekar kar li gayi. Customer ko suchna bhej di gayi hai."

"Samay badlein" → App customer ko notification bhejta hai:
"Pandit ji ne sujhaav diya hai ki Rahukaal ke karan yah samay uchit nahi hai. Kripya naya samay chunen."

System Panchang ke anusar kuch shubh samay bhi sujha sakta hai

"Asweekar karein" → Booking reject ho jati hai
"Booking asweekar kar di gayi. Customer ko suchna bhej di gayi hai."

Key Benefit: Yah feature Pandit ke gyaan aur visheshagya (Muhurat Suggestions) ko digital roop se sashakt banata hai aur customers ka vishwas badhata hai.

Feature 40: Smart Rescheduling Logic
Description:
Cancellation se bachne ke liye, customer ya Pandit pooja ka samay ya din badal (Reschedule) sakte hain. Yah feature sabhi edge cases ko cover karta hai - travel booked ho chuki hai, accommodation ki vyavastha hai, backup pandit opt kiya hai, aur consecutive bookings hain.

Pre-Reschedule Validation Checks
Kisi bhi reschedule request se pehle, system ye checks karega:

Calendar Availability Check: Kya Pandit nayi taarikh/samay par uplabdh hai? (kisi aur booking se overlap to nahi?)

Travel Time Validation: Kya naye samay tak pahunchne ke liye paryapt travel time hai? (pichli booking se gap calculate kare)

Long-Term Postpone Check: Kya nayi taarikh, original journey duration se bahut aage hai?

(Detailed cases as per original are preserved here, but for brevity, we present the core logic and edge cases.)

Key Benefit:

Customer ko flexibility - time change kar sakte hain, lekin uski sahi cost bhi deni hogi

Pandit ko protection - travel, accommodation, food sab automatic handle hoga

No financial loss to Pandit - customer hi extra cost bear karega

Backup system robust - har scenario ke liye backup plan

🔍 Features 38-40: Samagri Advance, Panchang Validation & Smart Rescheduling Edge Cases

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
F38-1	Pandit takes samagri advance (50% of ₹8,000 = ₹4,000) and then cancels the booking — advance not returned	Platform loses ₹4,000; Pandit keeps advance unfairly	Advance is blocked (not fully withdrawable) until Pandit uploads purchase receipts confirming samagri bought; on cancellation, advance triggers automatic clawback	CRITICAL
F39-1	Panchang API gives incorrect data for a rare regional muhurat — Pandit shown wrong alert	Pandit rejects a valid booking thinking it's inauspicious	Multiple Panchang sources cross-validated; alert shown as "note" not "error"; Pandit's expertise overrides system suggestion always	MEDIUM
F40-1	Customer reschedules booking 8 times, using it as a "priority hold" on Pandit without committing	Pandit loses income from other potential bookings; held hostage	Maximum 3 reschedules per booking; after 3rd, customer must cancel (with applicable penalty) or proceed on current date; no exceptions without ops approval	HIGH
F40-2	Customer reschedules from a non-festival date to Diwali — festival premium applies, but customer expects old price	Price dispute; customer alleges bait-and-switch	When rescheduling moves to a premium date, show new price prominently; customer must explicitly accept: "Naye date par ₹X extra lagega, sahi hai?"	HIGH
F40-3	Train ticket booked by platform for Pandit cannot be cancelled/refunded (inflexible fare class)	Platform bears cancellation cost unexpectedly	Always book train tickets with cancellation flexibility (no flex fare); flight: book fully refundable / cancellable within 24h where possible	HIGH
F40-4	Rescheduling triggers "long-term postpone" rule, requires return ticket — but Pandit has already started the journey	Complex mid-journey reversal; impractical rule application	Long-term postpone rule only applicable if Pandit has NOT yet departed; once departed (GPS confirms travel started), rule inapplicable until return	HIGH
Feature 41: Ghar Baithe Pooja - Connection Resilience & Dispute Handling
Description:
Ghar Baithe Pooja (video call) ke dauran kharab internet ke karan call katne ki samasya ko sambhalne ke liye reconnection buffer aur pardaarshi billing.

Reconnection Buffer (15 Mins):
Agar video call beech mein kat jati hai:

Timer automatically pause ho jata hai.

System dono ko alert bhejta hai (Pandit ko private):
"Connection toot gaya hai. Aapke paas wapas judne ke liye 15 minute hain."

Agar 15 minute ke andar wapas jud jate hain, to timer wahin se shuru hota hai.

Screen During Disconnection:
📹 Ghar Baithe Pooja - Connection Toota

Pooja: Vivah Sanskar
Pura hua samay: 90 minute
Shesh samay: 30 minute

⏸️ Timer pause kiya gaya
Wapas judne ke liye 15 minute ka samay

[🔄 Phir se connect karein]

Dispute Resolution:
Agar 15 minute baad bhi call connect nahi hoti, to 'Vivad' (Dispute) generate hota hai:

To Pandit: "Kshama karein, pooja poori nahi ho payi. Kul 90 minute ki pooja hui. Kya takniki samasya thi? 'Haan' bolein."

"Haan" → System record kiye gaye samay ke hisaab se aanshik bhugtan (Partial Payment) ki ganana karta hai aur operations team ko review ke liye bhej deta hai.

System Calculation for Partial Payment:
Aanshik bhugtan = (Pura hua samay / Kul nirdharit samay) × Fix dakshina

Udaharan: 2 ghante (120 min) ki pooja, 90 min hui, dakshina ₹2100

Aanshik bhugtan = (90/120) × 2100 = ₹1575

Final Notification:
"Aapka aanshik bhugtan ₹1575 process kar diya gaya hai. Shesh rashi customer ko wapas ki ja rahi hai."

Key Benefit: Pandit ki mehnat bekar nahi jati. Network jaane par bhi jitna kaam hua hai, uska uchit paisa milta hai.

Feature 42: Emergency SOS & Travel Safety
Description:
Pandit aksar anjaan jagahon ya alag-alag shehron mein yatra karte hain. Unki suraksha ke liye voice-activated SOS feature.

Setup (During Registration):
"Aapatkaaleen sthiti ke liye, kripya apne ghar ke kisi sadasy ka mobile number boliye."

Pandit emergency contact number bolta hai

"Kya yah number sahi hai? 'Haan' ya 'Nahi'."

"Aapatkaal mein hum isi number par aapke parivaar ko suchna bhejenge."

Emergency Trigger:
Kisi bhi khatre, durghatna ya customer ke saath durvyavahar ki sthiti mein Pandit keval app kholkar bol sakte hain:

Voice Command: "Aapatkaaleen sahayata" ya "Mujhe madad chahiye"

System Action:

Pandit ki live location (GPS) turant operations team ko bhej di jati hai.

Emergency contact (parivaar) ko SMS ke zariye location link chala jata hai:
"HmarePanditJi se suchna: Pandit Ramesh Sharma ne aapatkaaleen sahayata button dabaya hai. Unki location: [Google Maps Link]"

Operations team ki taraf se turant Pandit ko call aati hai:
"Pandit ji, humein SOS alert mila hai. Kya aap surakshit hain?"

Screen During SOS:
🆘 Aapatkaaleen Sahayata Sakriy

Aapki location operations team ko bhej di gayi hai
Aapke parivaar ko SMS bhej diya gaya hai

Operations team aapse call par sampark kar rahi hai

[📞 Team se baat karein] [📍 Location share karein]

Key Benefit: Pandit aur unke parivaar ko platform par surakshit mehsoos hota hai.

Feature 43: Universal Multilingual Backend Mapping (Invisible to User)
Description:
Bhasha ki rukawat ko poori tarah khatam karne ke liye, database mein har item aur pooja ka ek 'Universal ID' hoga. Yah feature user ko dikhai nahi deta, backend par kaam karta hai.

How it Works:

System ke backend mein har item ki ek unique ID hoti hai: ITEM_101 (sindoor ke liye)

Pandit ki screen/voice (Bhojpuri mein): "Sindoor" bolta hai → system ITEM_101 se map karta hai

Customer ki screen (English mein): "Vermilion" dikhta hai

Marathi customer ki screen par: "Kunku" dikhta hai

Example Mapping Table:

Universal ID	Pandit ki bhasha (Bhojpuri)	Customer ki bhasha (English)	Customer ki bhasha (Marathi)
ITEM_101	Sindoor	Vermilion	Kunku
ITEM_102	Mauli	Sacred Thread	Mauli
ITEM_103	Havan samagri	Havan Items	Havan samagri
POOJA_05	Vivah Sanskar	Wedding Ceremony	Lagnavidhi
POOJA_08	Griha Pravesh	House Warming	Grihapravesh
Implementation Details:

Admin panel mein saari mappings maintain ki jati hain

Nayi pooja ya item jodte samay, admin ko sabhi bhashaon mein naam dalne hote hain

Voice recognition bhi Universal ID se map hoti hai – Pandit Bhojpuri mein "Sindoor" bolega, system samjhega ITEM_101

Machine Learning ka use ho sakta hai ki naye shabdon ko bhi pehchana ja sake

Benefits:

Pandit: Apni matrubhasha mein poori tarah se kaam kar sakte hain

Customer: Apni chuni hui bhasha mein sab kuch dekh sakta hai

Scalability: Nayi bhashayen aasani se add ki ja sakti hain

Consistency: Har bhasha mein same item/pooja ki exact mapping

Key Benefit: Pandit apni matrubhasha (e.g., Bhojpuri ya Maithili) mein poori tarah se kaam kar sakte hain, aur app automatically customer ko wahi cheez uski chuni hui bhasha (e.g., English) mein anuvaad karke dikhayega. Isse pure Bharat ke Pandit kahin bhi apni sewayein de sakte hain.

🔍 Features 41-43: Connection Resilience, Emergency SOS & Multilingual Backend Edge Cases

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
F41-1	Customer deliberately disconnects the Ghar Baithe Pooja call 10 minutes in to get partial refund	Fraud by customer; Pandit loses income	Bill for time conducted up to disconnection; reconnection attempts made; if customer does not reconnect within 15 min, payment released to Pandit for time conducted	HIGH
F42-1	Pandit triggers SOS but is in a remote area with no network — alert never goes out	Pandit in danger with no backup	SOS alert must also trigger offline — store locally and transmit when ANY signal available (SMS over 2G as fallback); GPS location cached every 10 min locally	CRITICAL
F42-2	Pandit accidentally triggers SOS while performing pooja — family panics	False emergency causes distress; ops team wastes resources	SOS requires a 3-second hold + voice confirmation "haan mujhe madad chahiye" before triggering; accidental tap = cancel window of 10 seconds	HIGH
F42-3	SOS triggered but emergency contact (family member) has no data pack — SMS not delivered	Family never informed; emergency contact chain fails	Ops team is always primary responder; family contact is secondary; use multiple channels (SMS + WhatsApp + missed call); ops holds responsibility	HIGH
F43-1	Bhojpuri word for "ghee" is "ghiyo" — NLP maps it to wrong item_id; ₹500 ghee booked instead of ₹50	Incorrect samagri order; customer complaint	Custom NLP dictionary with synonym clusters + confidence scoring; low-confidence mappings flagged for confirmation	HIGH
F43-2	A new pooja or samagri item added by admin team in only Hindi — Tamil customer sees untranslated text	Customer cannot understand what was booked	Mandatory translation policy: no item/pooja goes live until all 11 supported languages are populated; staging check before production release	HIGH
Part 9: Pandit Digital Duniya - Live Streaming & Digital Darshan (Naya Mahatvpurn Aayaam)
Vision:
HmarePanditJi ab sirf booking platform nahi, balki Pandit ka apna digital sansar ban jayega. Jaise log Instagram ya YouTube par follow karte hain, waise hi ab log apne manpasand Pandit ji ko follow kar sakenge. Pandit ji apni dincharya, pooja-paath, ganga aarti, ya teerth yatra ko live stream kar sakte hain, aur unke bhakt (followers) isse jud sakte hain – chahe wo free ho ya paid.

Ye feature Pandit ko ek spiritual influencer ki identity deta hai aur unke bhakton ke saath direct digital rishta banata hai.

Feature 46: Live Puja Participation - "Naam Jap" Seva
Description:
Jab Pandit kisi teerth sthal (jaise Kashi, Rameswaram, Badrinath) par hote hain, to wo live stream mein bhakton ke liye vishesh pooja kar sakte hain. Bhakt apna naam likhwa sakte hain, aur Pandit live stream mein unka naam lekar pooja karte hain.

Setup:
"Pandit ji, ab aap kisi teerth sthan par hain? Kya aap wahan se bhakton ke liye 'Naam Jap' seva dena chahenge?"

Flow:

Step 1 - Announce Live: Pandit live stream start karte hain: "Aaj main Kashi Vishwanath mandir mein hoon. Jo bhi bhakt chahte hain ki unka naam yahan liya jaye, wo is live se judkar apna naam bhej sakte hain."

Step 2 - Follower Request:

Follower app mein "Naam Jap" button dabata hai

Apna naam aur sankalp (mannat) type karta hai

Pandit ki set ki hui price (e.g., ₹51, ₹101, ₹501) chukata hai

Step 3 - Pandit View: "Nayi naam jap request aayi hai. Ramesh Kumar, Delhi – apni mata ke swasthya ke liye. Shulk: ₹51. Kya ab naam lena chahenge?"

Step 4 - Live Mention: Pandit live mein bolte hain: "Abhi Delhi se Ramesh Kumar ji ne apni mata ke swasthya ke liye prarthana bheji hai. Bhagwan Vishwanath unki mata ko swasth rakhein."

Step 5 - Follower Gets Proof:

Follower ko notification: "Aapka naam Kashi Vishwanath mandir mein liya gaya."

Live stream recording ka clip (timestamp ke saath) share hota hai

Digital certificate bhi milta hai

Pricing Options:
Pandit set kar sakte hain:

Free: koi bhi naam bhej sakta hai

Paid per name: ₹10, ₹51, ₹101, ₹501

Package: 5 names for ₹200, etc.

Key Benefit: Bhakt jo physically teerth nahi ja sakte, wo digitally jude rahte hain. Pandit ki seva ka dayara badhta hai, aur unki bhakton se doori khatam hoti hai.

🔍 Features 44-52: Pandit Digital Duniya — Followers, Live Streaming & Subscriptions Edge Cases

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
F45-1	Pandit live streams from a fake location — claims to be in Kedarnath but is actually at home	Followers pay premium Teerth rates for fake spiritual experience; fraud	Geotag verification: live stream's GPS coordinates must match claimed teerth location within 500m; system cross-checks and labels stream accordingly	CRITICAL
F45-2	Pandit's live stream attracts 10,000 simultaneous viewers — server bandwidth cost is ₹50,000+	Platform loses money on successful streams without revenue ceiling	Paid streams cover server costs via pricing model; free streams must have viewer cap (e.g., 500 max) until Pandit opts into monetisation; CDN cost model review	HIGH
F45-3	Pandit uses live stream to discuss political or divisive religious content	Platform liable under IT Act; App Store removal risk	Community guidelines explicitly prohibit political content; AI content moderation for flagged keywords; human review within 60 seconds for live streams	CRITICAL
F46-1	Naam Jap requests come in from 200 people faster than Pandit can recite — queue backs up	People paid but their name wasn't called; fraud perception	Cap Naam Jap capacity per stream session (e.g., 50 names); show estimated wait time; overflow customers are offered auto-refund or next session booking	HIGH
F51-1	Subscription revenue classified as "aggregator" — platform may be liable for GST on subscriptions over ₹20L	GST non-compliance; notices from tax authorities	Legal counsel review of subscription revenue classification; platform must collect GST if liable and issue tax invoices to subscribers; CA consultation mandatory	CRITICAL
F51-2	Pandit passes away — active subscriptions continue charging; followers receive no service	Ethical violation; legal risk from consumer complaints	Pandit account inactivity > 30 days triggers ops check; on confirmed death, all subscriptions auto-cancelled, pro-rata refunds issued, followers notified	CRITICAL
F51-3	Underage child subscribes to Pandit's paid content using parent's account	COPPA-equivalent liability; payment dispute by parent	Parental controls: monthly subscription requires re-authentication (PIN/OTP) from account-holder mobile; age gate at signup	HIGH
F45-4	Pandit streams copyrighted devotional music (background bhajans) — DMCA takedown on the platform's app	App store removal; legal notice from music labels	Ban background music in live streams unless Pandit uploads their own or uses platform's licensed library; auto-detect via Content ID equivalent	HIGH
F48-1	Digital prasad e-certificate has a typo in the follower's name — religious significance to the follower	Complaints about incorrect divine document; emotional upset	Follower pre-confirms their name spelling before payment; name printed exactly as submitted; offer one free reissue within 24 hours	MEDIUM
F51-4	RBI e-mandate for subscription not set up correctly — subscriptions charge without 24-hour advance notice	Regulatory non-compliance with RBI PA guidelines; ₹1 crore+ penalty risk	Implement strictly: 24h pre-debit notification mandatory; use Razorpay recurring payment APIs with e-Mandate flow	CRITICAL
Cross-Feature & Systemic Edge Cases
Ye scenarios multiple features ko span karte hain aur sabse complex failure modes ko represent karte hain.

#	Scenario	Risk	Resolution	Severity
X-1	Pandit is mid-journey for Booking A when a last-minute high-value Backup Pandit offer arrives for Booking B (same day, different city)	Pandit accepts backup out of greed — cannot reach either venue; both bookings collapse	System must cross-check: if Pandit is in confirmed travel status, block all new booking/backup acceptance for that date window	CRITICAL
X-2	Pandit's Aadhaar has a name that differs from their bank account (nickname vs legal name); penny drop passes, TDS form shows different name	IT department mismatch; Pandit's 26AS form incorrect; tax liability confusion	During bank verification, if Aadhaar name ≠ bank name, ops team manually verifies and documents the discrepancy; use PAN-linked name for TDS	HIGH
X-3	Festival premium pricing (Feature 30) is active on a date the customer rescheduled to (Feature 40) — Pandit expects premium, system doesn't apply it	Revenue loss for Pandit; pricing logic conflict	Reschedule flow must re-evaluate all active pricing rules (festival premium, blackout) for the new date at time of reschedule confirmation	HIGH
X-4	Pandit does Ghar Baithe Pooja while simultaneously set as "online" for Consultancy — customer calls consultancy during pooja	Pandit distracted mid-pooja; poor experience for both parties	Accepting Ghar Baithe Pooja booking automatically sets Consultancy status to 🔴 for the duration of the booking +1 hour buffer; cross-service availability enforcement	HIGH
X-5	Pandit's IVR (Feature 7) accepts a booking automatically while Pandit is travelling for a previous booking; IVR system has no awareness of live travel state	Double booking via IVR; Pandit physically unable to be in two places	IVR acceptance must always check live calendar state in real time before allowing keypress acceptance; "Calendar full" IVR message if blocked	CRITICAL
X-6	Platform accumulates GST from customers, Pandits earn above ₹20L but don't have GSTIN — platform incorrectly collects GST on their behalf	GST fraud; both platform and Pandit exposed to IT/GST audit	Platform must NOT collect or remit GST on behalf of Pandits; each Pandit is an independent service provider; platform only collects its own commission's GST	CRITICAL
X-7	Pandit's profile has 200+ 5-star ratings but all from the same cluster of IP addresses — rating manipulation ring	Fraudulent top-ranking; genuine Pandits displaced	Anomaly detection: ratings from same device/IP, same time period, without completed bookings = auto-quarantine; manual ops review before ratings published	HIGH
X-8	Pandit dies mid-journey for a confirmed booking — operations receives no notification	Customer receives no Pandit; no contingency in place; estate may claim earnings	Emergency contact (Feature 42) auto-notified if Pandit's phone is inactive for 4+ hours during confirmed travel; ops escalation protocol; estate earnings held per legal process	CRITICAL
X-9	Data breach exposes Pandit's Aadhaar numbers, bank accounts, and GPS travel history	Identity theft, financial fraud, physical safety risk for Pandits	Security audit before launch; all PII encrypted at rest (AES-256); Aadhaar data masked after verification (store hash only); annual VAPT (vulnerability assessment); DPDP Act compliance; CERT-In breach notification	CRITICAL
X-10	Platform grows rapidly, a Pandit goes viral on social media — 10,000 bookings in 24 hours; system cannot handle load	System crash; all existing confirmed bookings lose state; massive liability	Load testing at 100x normal traffic before launch; auto-scaling infrastructure; calendar booking is idempotent — can safely retry without double-booking	HIGH

Antim Shabd
Ghar Baithe Pooja se Pandit duniya ke kisi bhi corner mein baithe customer ke liye pooja kar sakte hain - fixed dakshina, fixed duration.

Pandit Se Baat (Consultancy) se Pandit apne gyan ko bech sakte hain - chhoti-chhoti baaton ke liye bhi customer pay karega, per minute. Online/offline toggle smart hai:

App kholte hi puchega

Internet jaate hi offline

10 minute se zyada app band rahe to offline

Pandit khud "Nahi" bole to offline

Digital Duniya feature HmarePanditJi ko sirf booking platform se spiritual social platform mein transform kar deta hai. Ab Pandit sirf pooja karne ke liye nahi balki apne bhakton ke saath har din jude rah sakte hain. Ganga aarti ho, teerth yatra ho, ya koi vishesh pooja – sab digital ho jata hai.

Dono features milkar Pandit ki offline income ke saath online income ke do alag dwaar kholte hain.

Conclusion
HmarePanditJi sirf ek app nahi hai. Ye ek digital infrastructure hai jo Pandit ji ko unka samman, unki pehchan, aur unki kamai ka right price dilata hai.

Pandit ka time hai unki pooja mein, na ki travel aur tension mein. HmarePanditJi ye guarantee karta hai.

HmarePanditJi Platform Documentation
Complete Pandit-Facing Feature Set (with Integrated Pricing Architecture)
Platform Philosophy
Mool Mantra: "App Pandit ke liye hai, Pandit app ke liye nahi."

Har feature isliye design kiya gaya hai ki:

Jo Pandit smartphone chala sakte hain, wo aaram se use karein

Jo nahi chala sakte, unke liye IVR aur operations team kaam kare

Koi bhi Pandit platform se bina kisi dikkat ke jud sakta hai

Technical & Regulatory Fixes (डेवलपर्स के लिए ज़रूरी निर्देश)
Custom NLP Requirement (For Universal ID Mapping): डेवलपर्स के लिए नोट: Google/Apple का डिफ़ॉल्ट 'Speech-to-Text' संस्कृत के मंत्रों या स्थानीय भाषाओं (भोजपुरी/मैथिली) के पूजा-पाठ वाले शब्दों को 100% सही नहीं पकड़ पाएगा। इसके लिए टीम को एक कस्टम NLP (Natural Language Processing) डिक्शनरी बनानी होगी, जो 'हवन', 'मौली', 'सिंदूर' जैसे शब्दों को सही ITEM_ID से जोड़ सके।

RBI e-Mandate Compliance (For Subscriptions): डेवलपर्स के लिए नोट: 'पंडित के परिवार' (मंथली सब्सक्रिप्शन) फीचर के लिए, पेमेंट गेटवे (जैसे Razorpay/Cashfree) में RBI के e-Mandate और AFA (Additional Factor of Authentication) नियमों का सख्ती से पालन करना होगा। यूज़र को हर महीने पैसे कटने से 24 घंटे पहले नोटिफिकेशन भेजना अनिवार्य है।

The Development Roadmap: Phase-by-Phase Execution
Phase 1: The Core MVP (लॉन्च के लिए सबसे ज़रूरी)
Goal: पंडितों को जोड़ना, उनकी प्रोफाइल बनाना, ऑफलाइन बुकिंग लेना, और 'पंडित से बात' (Consultancy) चालू करके तुरंत कमाई शुरू करवाना।

Feature 1-3: Dual-Mode Entry, Voice-First Nav, Auto-Language

Goal: ऑपरेशन्स को ऑटोमेट करना, बड़ी बुकिंग्स (Ghar Baithe Pooja) शुरू करना, और विवादों (Disputes) को संभालना।

Part 0: Pandit Ji Ke Liye Safalta Ki Pehli Seedi (First Step to Success)
Objective: Is section ka maksad Pandit Ji ko platform ke benefits, especially economic aur ease-of-use ke terms mein, detail mein samjhana hai. Ye ek "Why you should use our App" walkthrough hai, jo bilkul voice-based hai aur skip bhi kiya ja sakta hai.

Tone/Style: Inspirational, respectful, aur tutorial form mein.

Swagat Sandesh: HmarePanditJi Par Aapka Swagat Hai
(Background mein shanti ka sangeet, swagat dhun)

App Voice:
"Namaste Pandit ji. HmarePanditJi par aapka bahut-bahut swagat hai. Ye platform aapke liye hi bana hai. Agle kuch minutes mein hum dekhenge ki yeh app aapke jeevan aur aamdani mein kya badlav la sakta hai. Humara Mool Mantra yaad rakhiye: 'App Pandit ke liye hai, Pandit app ke liye nahi.'"

(Screen par ek welcome animation ya logo dikhega, aur neeche do buttons: "Jaanein" aur "Skip karein". Agar Pandit "Skip" kare to seedha registration/login screen par chale jayenge.)

"Agar aap seedhe registration shuru karna chahte hain to 'Skip' bolein, nahi to 'Jaanein' bolkar humare saath bane rahein aur jaanein ki yeh app aapki zindagi kaise badal sakta hai."

1. Aamdani Mein Vriddhi: Nayi Arthik Samriddhi (Economic Benefits)
"Sabse pehle baat karte hain aapki aamdani ki. HmarePanditJi aapko aise kai tareeke deta hai jo aapki kamai ko badhate hain, aur wo bhi bina kisi jhanjhat ke."

Feature Highlight: Fixed Dakshina & Zero Negotiation
"Aapki mehnat ka sahi daam. Ab koi negotiation nahi! Har pooja ke liye aap apni fixed dakshina khud set karte hain. Jo aap set karte hain, woh aapko milta hai. Platform uska 15% alag se customer se leta hai."

Pehle: "Pandit ji, 2000 mein kar do na?" – molbhav karne wale customer ki tasveer.
Ab: Pandit ji ki profile par saaf likha "Vivah Sanskar – ₹35,000" aur customer ko checkout par total ₹40,250 dikhta hai (₹35,000 + 15% platform fee).

Voice:
"Pehle aapko customer se daam tay karne mein samay aur shanti dono kharab hoti thi. Ab pricing transparent hai. Aap apni dakshina set karte hain, platform uska 15% alag se customer se leta hai. Aapki dignity bani rehti hai, aur aapka waqt bachta hai."

Feature Highlight: Online Revenue Streams (Ghar Baithe Pooja & Consultancy)
"Aapka gyan ab sirf aapke shehar tak simit nahi. HmarePanditJi ne aapke liye do naye income streams khol diye hain – Ghar Baithe Pooja aur Pandit Ji Se Baat (Consultancy)."

Feature	Description	Income Potential
Ghar Baithe Pooja	Video call se pooja. Aap fixed dakshina set karte hain, customer uspar 15% platform fee deta hai.	₹2,000 - ₹5,000+ per pooja (aapki jeb mein)
Pandit Ji Se Baat (Consultancy)	Phone, Video ya Chat par salah. Aapke experience ke hisaab se alag Tiers (Seva, Gyani, Acharya) mein rate set kar sakte hain, ₹15 se ₹200 prati minute.	₹40,000+ per month (additional)
Voice:
"Ghar Baithe Pooja se aap America, London ya Dubai mein baithe customer ke liye pooja kar sakte hain. Aur Consultancy mein to expert Pandit ₹200 prati minute tak kama sakte hain. Aapke gyaan ka ab sahi moolya milega."

Feature Highlight: Backup Pandit Opportunity - Zero Risk Income
"Ab sirf standby rehne ka bhi paisa milega! Ye hai Backup Pandit Opportunity."

Notification example:
"Backup Pandit Offer – 15 May, Delhi Vivah. Standby fee ₹199 abhi aapke account mein."

Voice:
"Jab bhi koi customer booking karte waqt backup protection leta hai, aapko turant offer milta hai. Offer accept karte hi ₹199 aapke account mein aa jate hain – bina kuch kiye. Agar main Pandit cancel ho gaye, to aapko poori booking amount bhi milegi. Ye hai zero-risk income."

Feature Highlight: Instant Payment & Transparent Earnings
"Payment ke liye intezaar nahi. Khatam hote hi payment."

Payment success message:
"Booking #B7821 ka ₹35,000 (dakshina) + ₹1,600 (bhojan bhatta) aapke khate mein transfer kar diya gaya hai." (Platform ne apna 15% fee already customer se le liya hai.)

Voice:
"Jaise hi pooja samapt hoti hai, aapki dakshina aur saare bhatte (travel, food) aapke bank account mein credit ho jate hain. Platform ka commission customer se alag liya jata hai, isliye aapko hamesha wahi milega jo aapne set kiya tha."

Summary: Pandit Ji Ke Liye 4 Guarantees
"To chaliye, ab hum aapko dete hain 4 Guarantees jo HmarePanditJi aapko deta hai."

Guarantee	Aapko Kya Milega
Samman (Respect)	Verified badge, high ratings, zero negotiation. Aapki set ki hui dakshina aapko milegi.
Suvidha (Convenience)	Voice-first navigation, IVR support, auto-itinerary. Travel ka tension nahi.
Suraksha (Security)	Fixed income, instant payment, fair & simple penalty system (flat rates, कोई जटिल फॉर्मूला नहीं).
Samriddhi (Prosperity)	Offline + Online, multiple income streams (Consultancy Tiers, Backup fees, Live Streaming).
"Aapka samay ab sirf pooja aur gyan mein lagega, travel aur tension mein nahi. Shuru karte hain!"

Part 1: Onboarding & Registration (Pandit ka Pravesh)
(Features 1-7 remain unchanged as per the previous integration. The Pricing Architecture primarily affects Features 11, 12, 13, 24, 25, 32, 35, 38, 40, etc.)

Part 3: Service Setup & Configuration (Pandit ki Suvidha)
Feature 11: Dakshina Setup (Pricing) [UPDATED with Pricing Architecture]
Description:
Pandit har pooja ke liye final dakshina (fee) set karte hain. Ye wo amount hai jo unhe milegi, including all additional pandits. Important: Dakshina sirf aapki seva (service) ka mulya hai. Yatra, bhojan aur samagri ismein shamil nahi hain. Wo alag se judege.

Voice Prompt:
"Ab har pooja ke liye dakshina tay karte hain. Yah dakshina sirf aapki seva ka mulya hai. Yatra, bhojan aur samagri ismein shamil nahi hai. Wo alag se judege."

Per-Pooja Setup:
"[Pooja name] ([number] Panditon sahit) ke liye kul dakshina kitni rakhni hai?"

Examples:

Vivah Sanskar (5 Pandit) → ₹35,000

Griha Pravesh (2 Pandit) → ₹7,000

Satyanarayan Katha (1 Pandit) → ₹4,500

Confirmation:
"[amount] - sahi hai?"

"Haan" → save

"Nahi" → re-enter

Platform Commission Rule [NEW]:
Platform aapki set ki gayi dakshina par 15% service fee lega, jo customer se checkout par alag se jod kar dikhayi jayegi. Aapko hamesha wahi pura amount milega jo aapne set kiya hai.

Festival Premium Commission Rule [NEW]:
Agar aap festival season mein premium % lagate hain, to platform commission us poori nayi dakshina (base + premium) par lagega. Premium sirf fixed options mein se chun sakte hain: 10%, 20%, 30%, ya 50%.

Key Benefit: Clear pricing, no negotiation. Aapko pata hai ki kitna milega, customer ko pata hai ki use platform fee samet kitna dena hai.

Feature 12: Multi-Tier Pooja Samagri Packages [COMPLETELY RESTRUCTURED with Pricing Architecture]
Description:
Har pooja ke liye Pandit teen packages bana sakte hain: Basic, Standard, Premium. Lekin ab samagri ko dakshina se पूरी तरह अलग rakha jayega. Customer ko booking ke time teen clear options dikhenge.

Voice Prompt:
"Ab pooja samagri ke baare mein set karte hain. Samagri hamesha aapki dakshina se alag rakhi jayegi. Customer ko booking ke time teen options dikhenge. Aap bas apni preferred items aur unki companies bata dijiye."

Step 1 - Select Pooja: "Kis pooja ke liye?" → Pandit: "Vivah Sanskar"

Step 2 - Basic Package Items Creation (as before):
App Pandit se item, quantity aur preferred company puchega (e.g., "Sindoor 200g, Kesari brand"). Yeh list Platform ke liye banegi.

Step 3 - Standard & Premium Items Creation (as before):
Same process, extra items add karna.

Step 4 - Samagri Supply Preference [NEW - CRITICAL]:
Yeh step ab nahi puchha jayega ki aap samagri laa sakte hain ya nahi. Iski jagah, system automatically teeno options ko enable karega. Aapka kaam sirf items ki list aur preferred companies dena hai.

The Three Clean Options for Customer (as displayed in Customer App) [NEW]:

Customer ko booking ke time samagri ke liye ye teen mutually exclusive options dikhenge:

Option	Who Provides?	Pricing to Customer	Platform Revenue	Pandit's Role
A: Self-Arrange	Customer arranges samagri independently using Pandit's provided list.	₹0 on platform. Customer spends separately.	₹0 (No revenue)	Pandit provides item list during setup. No quality liability.
B: Platform Delivers	Platform sources, quality-checks, and delivers samagri to customer's address before pooja.	Platform's retail price = cost + 22% margin.	22% margin on samagri cost + delivery fee (if any).	Pandit's preferred brands guide platform's sourcing. Pandit has no procurement hassle.
C: Pandit Brings	Pandit procures and brings the samagri. Pandit is responsible for brand accuracy.	Pandit sets a separate samagri price for each package (e.g., Basic Samagri: ₹2,400).	10% commission on Pandit's stated samagri price.	Pandit must upload purchase receipt for items > ₹1,500 for quality check.
Voice Summary for Pandit (After Setup):
"Vivah Sanskar ke liye aapne items aur preferred companies bata di hain. Jab customer booking karega, use samagri ke liye teen option dikhenge:

Khud arrange kare: koi paisa nahi, aapki di list se.

Platform deliver kare: customer ko cost + 22% margin lagega.

Aap samagri laayein: aap uski alag seemat set kar sakte hain, jispar platform 10% commission lega."

Key Benefits of New Model:

Clarity: Samagri aur seva (dakshina) ka hisaab ab bilkul alag. GST complications solve.

No Conflict: Ab teen models ek doosre se compete nahi karte. Customer booking ke time ek clear option chunta hai.

Choice: Customer ko flexibility milti hai ki wo khud arrange kare, platform se le, ya Pandit se le.

Revenue: Platform ke paas ab samagri se kamai ke do clear raste hain (22% margin ya 10% commission).

Accountability: Receipt upload se quality control.

Feature 13: Comprehensive Travel & Accommodation Preferences [COMPLETELY RESTRUCTURED with Pricing Architecture]
Description:
Pandit apni travel aur accommodation preferences set kar sakte hain. Platform automatically in preferences ke hisaab se sabse affordable option book karta hai aur allowance calculate karta hai.

Introduction (Voice Prompt - Updated):
"Ab hum aapki yatra aur theherne ki pasand set karenge. Platform aapki di hui minimum comfort ke hisaab se, customer ke liye sabse kifayati (affordable) option book karega. Yatra ke paise platform aapko nahi dega, balki wo khud booking karega aur customer se uspar 7% margin lega. Aapko sirf travel karna hai."

Travel Preferences (Updated Logic):
Platform ab ek Distance-Based Slab System use karega. Pandit apni preference dega, platform us preference ke andar rehkar sabse affordable mode book karega.

Distance	Default Mode (based on Pandit's preference)	How it Works
0 – 15 km	Local Cab (as per Pandit's preference)	Platform actual cab book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
16 – 50 km	AC Cab / Own Car (flat rate)	Pandit ke preference ke hisaab se. Agar own car hai, to Pandit ko ₹800 flat milega (customer se ₹856). Agar cab hai to actual fare.
51 – 300 km	Train (min. Sleeper/3AC)	Platform ticket book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
301 – 700 km	Train (3AC) or AC Bus	Platform cheapest available option book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
700 km+	Flight (Economy)	Platform flight book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
Own Car Travel Rule [NEW - CRITICAL]:
Apni gaadi se yatra sirf 0-50 km ke liye hi claim ki ja sakti hai. Iske liye ₹800 ka flat rate diya jayega (pahle ke ₹12/km model ki jagah). 50 km se upar ki yatra ke liye, platform khud train ya flight book karega.

Accommodation Preferences (as before)

Budget / 3-star / 4-star hotel options.

Stay at customer's home: Yes/No.

Food Preferences & Allowance (as before)

"Sirf shuddh shakahari" etc.

Food allowance: Pandit set karega (e.g., ₹800/day). Ye allowance pass-through item hai, jispar platform koi commission nahi leta. Customer ko exact amount hi dikhega.

Key Benefit: Platform ab har haal mein travel ka sabse affordable option book karega, jo Pandit ki minimum comfort ke andar ho. Isse ₹19,200 car allowance jaisi problems nahi hongi.

Part 5: Booking Management & Daily Operations (Pandit ka Vyavhar)
Feature 24: Booking Cancellation with Smart Penalty Logic [COMPLETELY RESTRUCTURED with Pricing Architecture]
Description:
Pandit booking cancel kar sakte hain, lekin ab ek simple, flat penalty apply hogi jo cancellation ke time par based hai. Pichle complex formula (max 500+EC, 2000) ko hata diya gaya hai.

Cancellation Initiation (as before)

Reason for Cancellation (as before)

Penalty Calculation Logic [NEW - SIMPLE FLAT RATES]:
Penalty ab sirf is baat par depend karega ki Pandit ne kitne din pehle cancel kiya. Ye penalties fixed hain.

Cancellation Timing	Penalty Amount (Deducted from Pandit's Future Payout)
> 7 days before pooja	₹1,500
3 – 7 days before pooja	₹2,000
1 – 3 days before pooja	₹3,000
< 24 hours before pooja / No-show	₹5,000
Where Does the Penalty Money Go? [NEW - TRANSPARENT]:

Penalty Amount	Customer Credit (Inconvenience)	Platform Retains (Admin Cost)
₹1,500	₹1,000	₹500
₹2,000	₹1,200	₹800
₹3,000	₹2,000	₹1,000
₹5,000	₹3,000 + ₹500 to backup as hardship bonus	₹1,500
Cancellation Summary & Penalty Display [UPDATED]:
Jab Pandit cancellation confirm karta hai, app simple display karega:
"Aapne pooja se X din pehle cancel kiya hai. Aap par ₹[penalty] ka penalty lagega. Yah aapke agle bhugtan se kaat liya jayega. Kya fir bhi cancel karna hai?"

Key Benefit: Naya penalty system simple, predictable aur fair hai. Har Pandit voice call par bina formula samjhe ise samajh sakta hai. Yeh sahi incentive bhi banata hai ki jitna paas ki booking, utna bada penalty.

Feature 25: Backup Pandit Opportunity [COMPLETELY RESTRUCTURED with Pricing Architecture]
Description:
Yeh feature ab ek clean, funded model par kaam karega. Backup protection sirf un bookings ke liye available hai jahan customer ne ise khareeda hai. High-value bookings ke liye ye mandatory hai.

Trigger: Sirf Jab Customer Ne Backup Protection Pay Kiya Ho [NEW]
Customer booking ke time ₹299 ka Backup Protection Fee pay karta hai. Yah fee ₹25,000 se upar ki bookings ke liye mandatory hai, otherwise optional.

Three-Party Money Flow at Booking Time [NEW - CRITICAL]:

Party	Action at Booking Time	Amount & Destination
Customer	Pays optional backup protection fee.	₹299 → Held in escrow by payment partner.
Platform	Immediately transfers standby fee to backup Pandit.	₹199 released to backup Pandit's account within 2 hours of acceptance. ₹100 retained by platform.
Backup Pandit	Receives ₹199 standby fee unconditionally.	₹199 received and settled. No further obligation unless main cancels.
Main Pandit	Nothing at booking time.	No financial impact at booking. Impact only if they cancel.
Backup Offer Notification to Pandit [UPDATED]:
"🔔 Backup Pandit Offer - Nayi Booking ke liye. Accept karte hi ₹199 aapke account mein aa jayenge."

Offer Details:
🎯 Backup Pandit Offer

🕉️ Pooja: Vivah Sanskar
📍 Sthaan: Delhi, Greater Kailash
📅 Taarikh: 15 May, subah 11:00

🤝 Aapke Laabh:
1️⃣ Turant Standby Fee: Offer accept karte hi ₹199 aapke account mein. (Ye aapko tab bhi milega, chahe main Pandit aaye ya na aaye).
2️⃣ Agar Main Pandit Cancel Kare: Aapko poori booking amount (dakshina + travel + food + samagri) milegi, jo ₹58,000+ ho sakti hai. Aur ₹199 aapke paas already hain.
3️⃣ Koi Commitment Nahi: Sirf standby rehna hai, apne doosre kaam bhi kar sakte hain.

Kya aap backup Pandit banana chahenge?

[✅ Haan, ₹199 abhi le loon] [❌ Nahi, asweekar karein]

Voice Summary [UPDATED]:
"Naya backup Pandit offer. 15 May, Delhi Vivah. Offer accept karte hi ₹199 aapke account mein aa jayenge. Agar main Pandit cancel huye to poori booking amount milegi. Sweekar karein?"

Agar Main Pandit Cancel Karta Hai - Backup Active (Updated with new penalties):
Jab main Pandit cancel karta hai, to backup Pandit ko immediate notification ke saath poori booking transfer ho jayegi. Use guarantee fee alag se nahi milegi, kyunki wo ₹199 le chuka hai. Hardship situation mein (last-minute cancel), use penalty mein se ₹500 extra bonus bhi mil sakta hai.

Key Benefit Summary [UPDATED]:

Scenario	Backup Pandit Ko Kya Mila?
Main Pandit ne pooja ki	₹199 (bina kuch kiye, bas offer accept karke)
Main Pandit cancel, backup ne pooja ki	₹199 + Full booking amount (e.g., ₹58,000)
Last-minute cancel, backup ne pooja ki	₹199 + Full booking amount + ₹500 hardship bonus from penalty
Backup offer mila, reject kiya	Kuch nahi milta, lekin koi commitment bhi nahi

Feature 32: Consultancy Setup & Configuration [COMPLETELY RESTRUCTURED with Pricing Architecture]
Description:
Consultancy feature ab ek tier-based pricing model par kaam karega. Pandit ka rate unke experience, ratings aur consultations ki sankhya par nirbhar karega.

Enable Consultancy: (as before)

Communication Preferences: (as before)

Tier-Based Rate Setup [NEW - CRITICAL]:
Platform Pandit ko unke tier ke hisaab se rate range dikhayega. Pandit us range mein se apna rate choose kar sakte hain.

Tier	Eligibility	Rate Range (per minute)	Platform Commission	What Customer Sees
Seva	New registration, 0-49 consultations completed.	₹15 – ₹30/min	20%	"New Pandit, great rates to try." Verified badge shown.
Gyani	50+ consultations, ≥ 4.3★ average rating.	₹30 – ₹80/min	20%	"Experienced advisor. 50+ sessions completed." Star rating shown.
Acharya	200+ consultations, ≥ 4.7★, verified credential (Aacharya degree or 25+ years exp).	₹80 – ₹200/min	18% (lower commission as reward)	"Master scholar. Gold badge and credential verified."
Tier Progression [NEW]:

Tiers auto-upgrade honge jab Pandit eligibility criteria meet karega.

Notification: "Badhai ho! Aap ab Gyani tier ke liye qualified hain. Aapka rate range ab ₹30-80/min hai."

Tier downgrade possible agar rating 2 mahine tak threshold se neeche rahe.

Availability Setup - Smart Auto-Toggle: (as before)

Feature 34: Communication Request Flow with Wallet Check [UPDATED with Consultancy Rules]
(Basic flow as before, with additional customer protection rules)

Customer Protection Rules (Displayed to Customer, but Pandit should know) [NEW]:

Session Cost Cap: Customer apne aap ek session ke liye spending limit set kar sakta hai. Limit poore hone par call auto-end ho jayegi.

Minimum Billing: 3 minutes minimum billing. Agar call 3 minute se pehle drop hoti hai to customer se koi charge nahi.

Pre-Call Disclosure: Call connect hone se pehle customer ko estimated total cost dikhega.

Auto-Pause at 60 min: Har 60 minute baad call auto-pause hogi. Customer ko renew karna hoga.

Daily Spend Cap: Har account ke liye daily maximum ₹5,000 ka cap hai (customer settings mein badal sakta hai). Yeh child use ya fraud se bachata hai.

Call prakar: [Voice/Video/Chat]
Kul samay: [X] minute
Prati minute: ₹[rate]
Kul: ₹[gross]
Platform shulk ([20/18]%): -₹[commission]
Aapko mila: ₹[net]"

Part 10: Advance Booking & Cancellation Policy (NEW SECTION from Pricing Architecture)
Critical Gap Filled: Yeh section customer ke booking karne ke time se lekar cancellation tak ke pure financial flow ko define karta hai.

10.1 Advance Deposit Requirements (Based on Booking Window)

Booking Window	Deposit Required	Deposit Amount	What It Covers
Same-day / Next-day (0-48hrs)	MANDATORY	100% upfront	Full payment required for urgent bookings.
3–7 days ahead	Required	50% deposit	Covers Pandit's lost opportunity if customer cancels. Remaining 50% on pooja day.
8–30 days ahead	Required	30% deposit	Standard advance booking. Remaining 70% paid 48hrs before pooja.
31–90 days ahead	Required	20% deposit	Longer advance, lighter deposit.
91+ days ahead	Required	10% deposit	Planning-stage booking. Low deposit encourages early commitment.

> 30 days before pooja	100% refund	₹500 inconvenience fee	₹0 (service not rendered)

3–7 days before	40% refund	50% of dakshina	10% admin fee
1–3 days before	20% refund	70% of dakshina	10% admin fee
< 24 hours / No-show	0% refund	85% of dakshina	15% admin fee

Part 13: Multi-Day Ceremony & Holding Rules (NEW SECTION from Pricing Architecture)
13.1 Day Type Pricing

Day Type	Definition	Pandit Earns
Active Ritual Day	Pandit is performing pooja rituals.	Full Dakshina per active day OR agreed total for event.
Standby Day	Pandit present but not performing (prep day, rest day).	35% of single-day Dakshina as standby allowance.

13.2 The Maximum Holding Rules

Rule	What It Says	Why It Exists
Max Booking Duration	Maximum 7 consecutive days without Ops approval.	Prevents underpricing of long ceremonies.
Day-Count Commitment	Customer declares number of days at booking.	Pandit knows their schedule. No surprises.
Extension Fee	Each additional day beyond booked duration: full single-day Dakshina rate + ₹1,000 admin fee.	Makes extension expensive, forces better planning.
Partial-Day Rule	If Pandit released before noon: 50% of that day's rate. After noon: 100%.	Fair to both sides.
2x Rule (formalised)	Customer cannot reschedule to a date more than 2× the original booking window ahead.	Prevents customers holding Pandits' calendars indefinitely.

Pandit ka time hai unki pooja mein, na ki hisaab-kitaab mein. HmarePanditJi ye guarantee karta hai.

The Three Clean Options for Customer (as displayed in Customer App) [NEW]:

Customer ko booking ke time samagri ke liye ye teen mutually exclusive options dikhenge:

Option Who Provides? Pricing to Customer Platform Revenue Pandit's Role
A: Self-Arrange Customer arranges samagri independently using Pandit's provided list. ₹0 on platform. Customer spends separately. ₹0 (No revenue) Pandit provides item list during setup. No quality liability.
B: Platform Delivers Platform sources, quality-checks, and delivers samagri to customer's address before pooja. Platform's retail price = cost + 22% margin. 22% margin on samagri cost + delivery fee (if any). Pandit's preferred brands guide platform's sourcing. Pandit has no procurement hassle.
C: Pandit Brings Pandit procures and brings the samagri. Pandit is responsible for brand accuracy. Pandit sets a separate samagri price for each package (e.g., Basic Samagri: ₹2,400). 10% commission on Pandit's stated samagri price. Pandit must upload purchase receipt for items > ₹1,500 for quality check.

Platform deliver kare: customer ko cost + 22% margin lagega.

Aap samagri laayein: aap uski alag seemat set kar sakte hain, jispar platform 10% commission lega."

Key Benefits of New Model:
Clarity: Samagri aur seva (dakshina) ka hisaab ab bilkul alag. GST complications solve.
No Conflict: Ab teen models ek doosre se compete nahi karte. Customer booking ke time ek clear option chunta hai.
Choice: Customer ko flexibility milti hai ki wo khud arrange kare, platform se le, ya Pandit se le.
Revenue: Platform ke paas ab samagri se kamai ke do clear raste hain (22% margin ya 10% commission).
Accountability: Receipt upload se quality control.

"Ab hum aapki yatra aur theherne ki pasand set karenge. Platform aapki di hui minimum comfort ke hisaab se, customer ke liye sabse kifayati (affordable) option book karega. Yatra ke paise platform aapko nahi dega, balki wo khud booking karega aur customer se uspar 7% margin lega. Aapko sirf travel karna hai."

Travel Preferences (Updated Logic):
Platform ab ek Distance-Based Slab System use karega. Pandit apni preference dega, platform us preference ke andar rehkar sabse affordable mode book karega.

Distance Default Mode (based on Pandit's preference) How it Works
0 – 15 km Local Cab (as per Pandit's preference) Platform actual cab book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
16 – 50 km AC Cab / Own Car (flat rate) Pandit ke preference ke hisaab se. Agar own car hai, to Pandit ko ₹800 flat milega (customer se ₹856). Agar cab hai to actual fare.
51 – 300 km Train (min. Sleeper/3AC) Platform ticket book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
301 – 700 km Train (3AC) or AC Bus Platform cheapest available option book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
700 km+ Flight (Economy) Platform flight book karega. Customer actual fare + 7% dega.
Own Car Travel Rule [NEW - CRITICAL]:
Apni gaadi se yatra sirf 0-50 km ke liye hi claim ki ja sakti hai. Iske liye ₹800 ka flat rate diya jayega (pahle ke ₹12/km model ki jagah). 50 km se upar ki yatra ke liye, platform khud train ya flight book karega.

Accommodation Preferences (as before)
Budget / 3-star / 4-star hotel options.
Stay at customer's home: Yes/No.

Food Preferences & Allowance (as before)
"Sirf shuddh shakahari" etc.
Food allowance: Pandit set karega (e.g., ₹800/day). Ye allowance pass-through item hai, jispar platform koi commission nahi leta. Customer ko exact amount hi dikhega.

Key Benefit: Platform ab har haal mein travel ka sabse affordable option book karega, jo Pandit ki minimum comfort ke andar ho. Isse ₹19,200 car allowance jaisi problems nahi hongi.

Feature 25: Backup Pandit Opportunity [COMPLETELY RESTRUCTURED with Pricing Architecture]
Description:
Yeh feature ab ek clean, funded model par kaam karega. Backup protection sirf un bookings ke liye available hai jahan customer ne ise khareeda hai. High-value bookings ke liye ye mandatory hai.

Trigger: Sirf Jab Customer Ne Backup Protection Pay Kiya Ho [NEW]
Customer booking ke time ₹299 ka Backup Protection Fee pay karta hai. Yah fee ₹25,000 se upar ki bookings ke liye mandatory hai, otherwise optional.

Three-Party Money Flow at Booking Time [NEW - CRITICAL]:

Party Action at Booking Time Amount & Destination
Customer Pays optional backup protection fee. ₹299 → Held in escrow by payment partner.
Platform Immediately transfers standby fee to backup Pandit. ₹199 released to backup Pandit's account within 2 hours of acceptance. ₹100 retained by platform.
Backup Pandit Receives ₹199 standby fee unconditionally. ₹199 received and settled. No further obligation unless main cancels.
Main Pandit Nothing at booking time. No financial impact at booking. Impact only if they cancel.

3️⃣ Koi Commitment Nahi: Sirf standby rehna hai, apne doosre kaam bhi kar sakte hain.

Kya aap backup Pandit banana chahenge?

[✅ Haan, ₹199 abhi le loon] [❌ Nahi, asweekar karein]

Jab main Pandit cancel karta hai, to backup Pandit ko immediate notification ke saath poori booking transfer ho jayegi. Use guarantee fee alag se nahi milegi, kyunki wo ₹199 le chuka hai. Hardship situation mein (last-minute cancel), use penalty mein se ₹500 extra bonus bhi mil sakta hai.

10.1 Advance Deposit Requirements (Based on Booking Window)

Booking Window Deposit Required Deposit Amount What It Covers
Same-day / Next-day (0-48hrs) MANDATORY 100% upfront Full payment required for urgent bookings.
3–7 days ahead Required 50% deposit Covers Pandit's lost opportunity if customer cancels. Remaining 50% on pooja day.
8–30 days ahead Required 30% deposit Standard advance booking. Remaining 70% paid 48hrs before pooja.
31–90 days ahead Required 20% deposit Longer advance, lighter deposit.
91+ days ahead Required 10% deposit Planning-stage booking. Low deposit encourages early commitment.
10.2 Customer Cancellation Matrix

Cancel When Customer Refund Pandit Compensated Platform Retains

30 days before pooja 100% refund ₹500 inconvenience fee ₹0 (service not rendered)
15–30 days before 80% refund 15% of dakshina 5% admin fee
7–14 days before 60% refund 30% of dakshina 10% admin fee
3–7 days before 40% refund 50% of dakshina 10% admin fee
1–3 days before 20% refund 70% of dakshina 10% admin fee
< 24 hours / No-show 0% refund 85% of dakshina 15% admin fee
Note on Travel & Samagri: Agar booking cancel hone se pehle travel booked ya samagri khareedi ja chuki hai, to uska poora kharcha customer hi uthayega, cancellation timing chahe jo ho.

Part 13: Multi-Day Ceremony & Holding Rules (NEW SECTION from Pricing Architecture)
13.1 Day Type Pricing

Day Type Definition Pandit Earns
Active Ritual Day Pandit is performing pooja rituals. Full Dakshina per active day OR agreed total for event.
Standby Day Pandit present but not performing (prep day, rest day). 35% of single-day Dakshina as standby allowance.
Travel Day Day spent travelling to/from venue. ₹500 flat per travel day + food allowance.
13.2 The Maximum Holding Rules

Rule What It Says Why It Exists
Max Booking Duration Maximum 7 consecutive days without Ops approval. Prevents underpricing of long ceremonies.
Day-Count Commitment Customer declares number of days at booking. Pandit knows their schedule. No surprises.
Extension Fee Each additional day beyond booked duration: full single-day Dakshina rate + ₹1,000 admin fee. Makes extension expensive, forces better planning.
Partial-Day Rule If Pandit released before noon: 50% of that day's rate. After noon: 100%. Fair to both sides.
2x Rule (formalised) Customer cannot reschedule to a date more than 2× the original booking window ahead. Prevents customers holding Pandits' calendars indefinitely.

Antim Shabd (Updated)

HmarePanditJi ab ek financially robust, transparent aur fair platform hai. Pandit ki dakshina, travel, samagri aur backup - har cheez ka hisaab saaf hai. Platform ka commission alag hai, Pandit ki kamai alag. Complex formulas hata diye gaye hain, simple flat rules la diye gaye hain.

Ghar Baithe Pooja se Pandit duniya ke kisi bhi corner mein baithe customer ke liye pooja kar sakte hain - fixed dakshina, fixed duration.

Pandit Se Baat (Consultancy) se Pandit apne gyan ko bech sakte hain, ab Tiers ke saath: Seva, Gyani, Acharya. Har tier ki apni alag pehchan aur rate range.

Backup Pandit Opportunity ab ek funded model hai: ₹299 customer se, ₹199 turant backup Pandit ko.

Digital Duniya feature HmarePanditJi ko sirf booking platform se spiritual social platform mein transform kar deta hai. Ab Pandit sirf pooja karne ke liye nahi balki apne bhakton ke saath har din jude rah sakte hain. Ganga aarti ho, teerth yatra ho, ya koi vishesh pooja – sab digital ho jata hai.

Dono features milkar Pandit ki offline income ke saath online income ke do alag dwaar kholte hain.

Pandit ka time hai unki pooja mein, na ki hisaab-kitaab mein. HmarePanditJi ye guarantee karta hai.

Technical & Regulatory Fixes (Developers ke liye zaroori notes)
Custom NLP Requirement (Universal ID Mapping): Developers ke liye note: Google/Apple ka default Speech-to-Text Sanskrit ke mantras ya local bhashaon (Bhojpuri/Maithili) ke pooja-related shabdon ko 100% sahi nahi pakad payega. Isliye team ko ek custom NLP dictionary banana hoga jo 'havan', 'mauli', 'sindoor' jaise words ko sahi ITEM_ID se map kare.
RBI e-Mandate Compliance (Subscriptions ke liye): 'Pandit ke Parivar' (monthly subscription) feature ke liye, payment gateway (jaise Razorpay/Cashfree) mein RBI ke e-Mandate aur AFA (Additional Factor of Authentication) rules ka strictly palan karna hoga. Har month paisa cutne se 24 hours pehle user ko notification dena mandatory hai.

Objective: Is section ka maksad Pandit Ji ko platform ke benefits (especially economic aur ease-of-use terms mein) detail mein samjhana hai. Ye ek "Why you should use our App" walkthrough hai, jo bilkul voice-based hai aur skip bhi kiya ja sakta hai.
